name: RuntimeOwner
notes: Planned owner of normal command execution; not default until oracle evidence says so.

name: ClientSlot
notes: Planned owner-loop representation of one connected client.

name: RuntimeEvent
notes: Planned event channel from background systems into the owner loop.

notes: Typed knobs for owner-loop experiments; must not alter default behavior silently.

notes: Existing command API; migration target must preserve normal dispatch semantics.
